source_scope: LOT0-01 (SLM-248) fidelity-contract sweep for a faithful LOTUS-to-OpenUI causal transfer. Covers the LOTUS looped-latent-CoT paper, its reference implementation, and the CODI comparator named in the issue's preregistered evidence nuances. The canonical LOTUS / SLM-138 adversarial-audit Linear document is recorded as an unresolved external reference per the parent issue's explicit instruction to proceed without it.

sources.title: LOTUS: Looped Transformers with Latent Chain-of-Thought
sources.summary: A looped, weight-reused causal transformer backbone runs R recurrent forward passes over K parallel latent reasoning blocks of c positions each, with the original input embedding re-injected at every pass (E + h_{t-1}); latent positions are supervised by projecting through the base model's own LM head against gold explicit-CoT-step tokens, with an explicit-to-latent curriculum that progressively replaces visible CoT tokens with latent positions across training stages. Reported to close most of the gap to explicit CoT at 3B scale while cutting thought-phase latency 2.5x-6.9x.

authors: additional authors not independently verified in this session
metadata.feedback_claim: A fixed-size latent workspace looped through a causal backbone, seeded with the original embedding, curriculum-trained from explicit CoT tokens, and read out through the shared LM head can approach explicit-CoT quality at a fraction of the decode latency.
metadata.repo_relevance: LOT0-01 fidelity contract mechanism rows 2-8 (K x c workspace, loop, embedding injection, curriculum, post-loop head, final loss, fixed R).
metadata.limitations: Only the abstract/metadata was fetched in this session (WebFetch, 2026-07-21); the full PDF's numeric GSM8K/SVAMP tables and per-config latency figures were not independently re-derived here. Those specific numbers are carried from the parent issue's preregistered evidence-nuances list and are marked secondary_preregistered in the contract, not primary_fetched.
metadata.novel_hypothesis: None implemented; LOT0-01 is a docs/spec-only fidelity contract and preregistered go/no-go gate, not a model change.

sources.title: yingfan-bot/lotus reference implementation
sources.summary: Reference training/eval code for LOTUS. scripts/lotus.py implements the looped forward pass (n_looped_iters, c_thought, block_start = loop_idx * c_thought, latent_injection_mode in {add, replace}, intermediate_loss_after_loop, shared base_model.lm_head). args/gsm8k_lotus_llama3b.yaml configures a two-stage recipe: Stage-1 explicit-CoT SFT checkpoint (yingfanbot/gsm-cot-llama3b) as init, Stage-2 looped latent training with a max_latent_stage curriculum, c_thought=25, intermediate_loss_weight=0.05, codi_loss_weight=0.0.

authors: yingfan-bot (GitHub handle; individual author identity not independently verified in this session)
metadata.feedback_claim: The paper's mechanisms (K x c latent blocks, R-loop causal recurrence, E + h_{t-1} injection, post-loop shared-head supervision, fixed-R primary config) are concretely realized as named, inspectable config knobs, not just prose.
metadata.repo_relevance: LOT0-01 fidelity contract's paper/code evidence column for every mechanism row; source of the required-control names (K/c sweep, replace/no-injection ablation, R sweep, per-iteration vs post-loop control).
metadata.limitations: scripts/lotus.py and args/gsm8k_lotus_llama3b.yaml were fetched via WebFetch on 2026-07-21 and paraphrased through a summarizing model rather than read as raw diffed source in this session; quoted identifiers (c_thought, n_looped_iters, latent_injection_mode, intermediate_loss_after_loop, block_start) are treated as reliable but the full file body was not independently reproduced verbatim here.

sources.title: CODI (compact latent-CoT distillation comparator named in the LOTUS evidence nuances)
sources.summary: Named in the parent issue's preregistered evidence nuances as a comparator: LOTUS+CODI reaches 70.6 +/- 0.2 vs LOTUS 70.0 +/- 0.9 on 3B GSM8K, and CODI is reported faster than LOTUS under the compact latency protocol. Not independently fetched in this session; the exact arXiv id above is inferred from the issue's naming convention and is unverified.

authors: not independently verified in this session
metadata.feedback_claim: A compact latent-CoT distillation baseline can match or exceed a looped-recurrence baseline's accuracy at lower latency, which the LOT0 contract must not silently erase when scoping a LOTUS-faithful transfer.
metadata.repo_relevance: LOT0-01 evidence_nuances (codi-faster-than-lotus, gsm8k-3b-accuracy); motivates keeping the latency_frontier and efficiency_frontier claim classes distinct from semantic_quality.
metadata.limitations: This entry's URI/arXiv id was not independently fetched or verified in this session; treat as an unresolved citation pointer, not a confirmed source. The comparative numbers themselves are carried verbatim from the parent issue text (see evidence_nuances in the fidelity contract).
